post.description: Always returns 200 — never reveal whether the email exists.

Session-authed: bind a pending device-code grant to the current user
and chosen workspace. Verifies the user is a member of that workspace
(otherwise it would be a confused-deputy: an attacker who tricked you
into running `thomas cloud login` could attach the device to their
workspace).

ApproveRequest.title: ApproveRequest
ApproveRequest.description: Web → API: approve a pending device-code grant for the current user.

ModelRef.title: ModelRef
ModelRef.description: A (provider, model) pair. Used inside policy / bundle specs.

PolicyUpdateRequest.title: PolicyUpdateRequest
PolicyUpdateRequest.description: All fields optional — PATCH-like semantics on PUT.
